ddls:
CREATE TABLE "audio_files" (
  "audio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio file */,
  "audio_path" TEXT /* File path to the audio recording */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the audio recording in seconds */,
  "split" TEXT /* Split criteria if the audio is divided */,
  "recording_date" TEXT /* Date when the recording was made */,
  "recording_time" TEXT /* Time when the recording was made */,
  "recording_device" TEXT /* Device used to record the audio */,
  "recording_location" TEXT /* Location where the recording took place */,
  "recording_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the recording */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the audio file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spectrograms" (
  "spectrogram_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spectrogram */,
  "audio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated audio file */,
  "spectrogram_path" TEXT /* File path to the spectrogram image */,
  "spectrogram_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the spectrogram */,
  "spectrogram_format" TEXT /* Format of the spectrogram file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spectrogram_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spectrograms_audio_id FOREIGN KEY ("audio_id") REFERENCES audio_files ("audio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation record */,
  "audio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated audio file */,
  "annot_path" TEXT /* File path to the annotation file */,
  "annot_format" TEXT /* Format of the annotation file */,
  "annotator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was created */,
  "annotation_time" TEXT /* Time when the annotation was created */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_audio_id FOREIGN KEY ("audio_id") REFERENCES audio_files ("audio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_annotator_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "audio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audio file being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the resource */,
  "access_duration" REAL /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_audio_id FOREIGN KEY ("audio_id") REFERENCES audio_files ("audio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "birds" (
  "bird_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bird species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the bird */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the bird */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family to which the bird species belongs */,
  "order" TEXT /* Order to which the bird species belongs */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the bird species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bird_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bird_songs" (
  "bird_song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bird song record */,
  "bird_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated bird species */,
  "audio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated audio file */,
  "behavior" TEXT /* Behavior associated with the bird song */,
  "context" TEXT /* Context in which the bird song was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bird_song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bird_songs_audio_id FOREIGN KEY ("audio_id") REFERENCES audio_files ("audio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bird_songs_bird_id FOREIGN KEY ("bird_id") REFERENCES birds ("bird_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recording_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recording session */,
  "audio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audio file recorded during the session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the recording session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the recording took place */,
  "session_leader" INTEGER /* ID of the user who led the recording session */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the recording session */,
  "session_duration" REAL /* Duration of the recording session in minutes */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the recording session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recording_sessions_audio_id FOREIGN KEY ("audio_id") REFERENCES audio_files ("audio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recording_sessions_session_leader FOREIGN KEY ("session_leader") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "processing_history" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each processing event */,
  "audio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audio file processed */,
  "process_date" TEXT /* Date when the processing occurred */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for processing the audio file */,
  "processing_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the processing */,
  "processing_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the processing event */,
  "processing_duration" REAL /* Duration of the processing event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_processing_history_audio_id FOREIGN KEY ("audio_id") REFERENCES audio_files ("audio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_processing_history_processing_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("processing_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notification_settings" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification setting record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user for whom the settings apply */,
  "email_notifications" INTEGER /* Preference for email notifications */,
  "sms_notifications" INTEGER /* Preference for SMS notifications */,
  "push_notifications" INTEGER /* Preference for push notifications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notification_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action occurred */,
  "log_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the action taken */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session during which the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_logs_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES recording_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_tags" (
  "audio_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio-tag association */,
  "audio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audio file */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tag was associated with the audio file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audio_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_tags_audio_id FOREIGN KEY ("audio_id") REFERENCES audio_files ("audio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id")
)
